partner.title: Partner Linking
partner.description: Share your code with your partner to connect your accounts.
partner.newCodeReady: Your new code is ready. The old one is no longer valid.
partner.canGenerateNew: You can generate a new code whenever you want.
partner.canSendLetters: You can now send letters to your partner
partner.deleteCodeWarning: Your code will be deleted. You'll need to generate a new one to link.
partner.deleteCodeWarningLinked: WARNING! Deleting your code will UNLINK your partner too. Both of you will need to generate new codes and link again.
partner.regenerateCodeWarning: A new code will be created. The old code will stop working.
partner.regenerateCodeWarningLinked: WARNING! Regenerating your code will UNLINK your partner. Both of you will need to link again.
partner.unlinkWarning: You will no longer be connected to {partnerName}. You can link again using codes.
partner.partnerUnlinkedMessage: Your partner has deleted or regenerated their linking code. You are no longer connected. You can generate a new code and share it to link again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get alerts when new notes arrive.
notifications.willNotify: We'll notify you when letters arrive

mockLetter1.content:
My Dearest,

Just a little note to say I'm thinking of you. Remember that time we tried to bake a cake and ended up covering the whole kitchen in flour? I was just thinking about it and couldn't stop smiling. Every moment with you is an adventure, even the messy ones.

Can't wait to see you tonight.

All my love,
Your Love

mockLetter2.content:
Hey You,

I saw the cutest little bee in the garden today and it made me think of my honey. That's you!

Thank you for being the sweetest part of my life. I feel so lucky to have you.

Yours forever,
Your Love

mockLetter3.content:
To my one and only,

Thank you for the beautiful notes. They always make my day brighter. I'm writing this one to seal my love for you, today and always. You mean the world to me.

With all my heart,
Me

mockLetter4.content:
My Love,

This crimson note is for my burning love for you. I hope this note finds you well. I was just reminiscing about our first date. How nervous and excited we both were! It feels like just yesterday, and yet look at how far we've come.

I love you more each day.

Forever and always,
Your Love
